### [My Predictions for 2020](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-j/)
It's that time of year again. In this week's blog I'll make my best attempt to predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year! Reds, Bengals, and Politics? You won't want to miss today's post! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Merry Christmas!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog I keep politics brief with a short update and share a Christmas greeting. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Impeachment - Here We Go](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Today's the day. Democrats in the House are actually going to go through with it. They are going to impeach President Trump - on the flimsiest of grounds! In this week's blog, I give you my thoughts on how this all plays out. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Impeaching the President - They're Really Going to Do It](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhlhilhl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats in Congress have been calling for President Trump's impeachment since the day he was inaugurated. In the next few days, the Democrat-led House will presumably vote for impeachment. In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming impeachment vote in the House, how the Senate will likely vote, and how this whole process is doing irreparable harm to our nation. Here’s the problem, friend: The Democratic National Committee is requiring that all the Democratic candidates reach 5% in four national polls or 7% in two early state polls to make this month’s presidential primary debate. **But there hasn’t been a single qualifying early state poll since _November_.** The DNC can’t properly gauge who’s qualified to participate if they’re working off of dated information — they need to push for more early state polls so they can listen to the will of the American voter. 2019 has been a GREAT year to be an American thanks to President Trump's incredible leadership.

* **Hispanic-American unemployment hit the lowest point ever recorded**

| | Friend, I'm so proud of the campaign we've built together. We've accomplished so much together and made our mark on history. We've stood up for the most vulnerable Americans--folks who are left out, cast aside, marginalized. We've fought for not only the middle class, but also the poor and those who are struggling the most. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc976/3eb3e2fc/6a7b3a09/744ea5df/1979576154/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1212738343588511747?s=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20200101_em_camp_castro_all&source=20200101_em_camp_castro_all")
---

We've put forward some of the most bold and comprehensive policy that rivals any candidate. We were the first to release polices on immigration, lead exposure, police violence, Indigenous communities, farmworkers, foster care, and hunger. And we set the pace on so many other important issues.

We traveled to communities not typically visited by presidential candidates to shine a light on important issues. We walked the storm drain tunnels beneath the Las Vegas strip where folks experiencing homelessness take shelter. We crossed the border to Matamoros, Mexico to see the effects of Trump's immigration policy. We met with people living in a trailer park in Waukee, Iowa, after a corporate landlord jacked up their rent.

We've told the truth at a time when lies come easy out of the White House. We were the first to call for Trump's impeachment. We said frankly from the debate stage that police violence IS gun violence. And we said that it's time for a state other than Iowa or New Hampshire to vote first, so that our primaries reflect the diversity of our party and nation.

This campaign left our politics better than we found it--and that's due in large part to you. You made phone calls, knocked doors, donated, and told your friends and family about our vision to put people first. I can't thank you enough.

That's why, it's with a heavy heart and profound gratitude, that today I will suspend my campaign for President of the United States. With the Iowa caucuses just around the corner, and given the circumstances of this campaign season, I have determined that it simply isn't our time.

I know this news hurts--but I'm not done fighting. I'm going to keep working to build an America where everyone counts, and where Democrats win races up and down the ballot.

I hope you'll join me in that fight.

With gratitude,
Julian

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment proceedings. He promoted Chad Wolf, architect of the family separation policy, to be the top Homeland Security undersecretary and the de facto DHS chief. And that heinous policy is still in place, no matter how well the administration's tried to bury coverage of it. And even though lower courts have ruled consistently against his illegal decision to end DACA and set up DREAMers for deportation, the president took his appeal to the Supreme Court \-- where Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. | Just this morning, Julian Castro announced that he is ending his campaign for president -- becoming yet another candidate of color exiting a field that started out as the most racially diverse in our nation's history. Friend, Just this morning, Julian Castro announced that he is ending his campaign for president -- becoming yet another person of color exiting a field of candidates that began as the most diverse in our nation's history. Julian was the only Latino candidate in the race. He made our conversations about the housing crisis, immigration, and policing, among other critical issues, stronger. And he has always stood up to be a powerful advocate for our country's most vulnerable and for those who are too often left out of the national conversation. Here's the reality: It seems like billionaires with bottomless checkbooks have a clearer path to the nomination than talented, experienced, qualified candidates like Julian Castro. **Juli an's early exit is a loss for our party and this nominating process.** **We need Cory 's voice now more than ever. Derek --

Over the past year, Mark has worked hard on the issues that matter most to Virginians.

Mark has led the fight to secure our elections. He fought to protect gains we've made on healthcare, to lower prescription drug prices, and to make sure that people with pre-existing conditions continue to have access to quality care. And he continues to work on other important issues from strengthening our economy for American workers to improving care for our veterans.

Mark is looking forward to getting back to work for Virginians as soon as the Senate reconvenes in January. But as he prepares for the new year, Mark wants to know: **[What issues do _you_ want him to focus on in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ff/53d9897e/53ac135f/1c89cb09/3955501593/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-2020issues2")**

name: John Delaney
subject: From Montezuma to Tripoli
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b906ca/30fd46cd/32356f5c/23575212/2797215556/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_field_2020.01.02_e1_jkd_iowa_all&source=em_field_2020.01.02_e1_jkd_iowa_all") Friends,

I hope you are having a wonderful holiday season and that you are enjoying the blessing of friendship and family. April and I enjoyed Christmas with our four daughters and family but are now turning our full attention to Iowa. The Iowa caucuses are only 32 days away and I want to fill you in on our plans.

On January 3rd, April and I kick off our "From Montezuma to Tripoli" tour with an event in Tripoli, Iowa. From there our campaign bus (nicknamed "big blue") will make 40 stops across rural Iowa communities that no other campaign visit and end in Montezuma, Iowa on January 27th. Our only break will be a few trips to the Granite State of New Hampshire for some important events and town halls.

Our Iowa trip is themed around "sending a message" to the Democratic Party that our country needs a moderate, economic focused, problem solver to beat Trump and start getting Washington working again. The trip will highlight several important issues, including:

**The Rural Economy:** Creating jobs in rural America is one of the central challenges of our time, and we've invested the time and have the vision to do just that. As legendary Iowa journalist Chuck Offenburger said in his endorsement of me (_Delaney is the Real Deal_): "There's not been any other candidate who's come even close to Delaney in how he's worked Iowa in this election cycle." **I 'm committed to rural America and on this trip, I will be asking rural Iowa to caucus for me and send a message to the DNC that our party is not just about the coasts!**

**Healthcare:** Pulitzer prize-winning Iowa journalists Art Cullen called my BetterCare healthcare plan "the best plan out there." On the debate stage, I was the first candidate to point out the flaws in the Medicare For All proposal and since then almost all the major candidates have followed my lead and backed away from proposals that eliminate private health insurance as an option. The problem is, most of them don't have a vision for universal healthcare which is what our country needs. **I 'm committed to building a common sense universal healthcare plan and I'm asking Iowans to caucus for me if that's what they think we need!**

**Jobs:** Trump is going to run on the economy and while most of the other candidates are talking about impeachment, class warfare or upending the entire economic model of the United States, I will be talking about "jobs, jobs, jobs." My dad was a union electrician and he taught me the only political lesson I will ever need: "if you care about workers, vote for the Democrat." I want to get the Democratic Party back to that message. **As the only candidate in the Iowa caucus who was a leader in business and served in Congress, I known how to create jobs with good pay. So I'm asking Iowans to caucus for me if they want the Democratic Party to be the party of jobs!**

subject: USA Today poll: Trump beats Sanders by 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | "WASHINGTON - President Donald Trump, the first modern president to face impeachment during his first term in the White House, now leads his top Democratic rivals in his bid for a second, a new USA TODAY/Suffolk University Poll finds. "The national survey, taken as the House of Representatives planned an impeachment vote and the Senate a trial, showed Trump defeating former Vice President Joe Biden by 3 percentage points, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders by 5 points, and Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren by 8 points. "In hypothetical head-to-head contests, Trump also led South Bend, Indiana, Mayor Pete Buttigieg by 10 points and former New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg by 9." \-- _USA Today_ Given the rapid shift in support toward President Trump, we need to know if your feelings toward him have changed. **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6e/6e9863e8/1794229e/1db04a9c/246014642/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/esNLVTOU") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6e/6e9863e8/1794229e/1db04a9c/246014642/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/esNLVTOU") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6e/6e9863e8/1794229e/1db04ae3/246014642/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200102b.ND&refcode2=XykOlmEsma6Xjl0yeqIs")

name: 314 Action
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| First off, thank you so much for stepping up and helping us reach our goal to close out 2019. We know we pinged your inbox a lot in the past few days, but with your help, we hit our goal, and we are in a great position for this critical election year.

We are laser-focused on races up and down the ballot in 2020. With your help, we are going to elect Democratic Scientists all across the country.

**But before we start our hard work this year, we need to hear from you.**

You are a critical member of our team, and we need to learn more about the issues that matter most to you. [This survey will only take a minute, can you share your thoughts with us now?](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-surve-jan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+This+survey+will+only+take+a+minute+can+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1") | | [Take Our Survey](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-surve-jan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Take+Our+Survey&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1")
---
We are investing heavily in races from Alaska to New York, and we know that we can have great success in electing science-minded Democrats. We understand that we share similar values: action on our climate crisis, lowering healthcare costs, and bringing science back into government. **But we need to make sure we are aligned on the issues that matter most to you.**

[Can you take our quick 2020 priorities survey? We need 15,000 responses to make sure we have accurate data.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-surve-jan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+take+our+quick+2020+priorities+s&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1")
| [Take Our Survey](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-surve-jan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Take+Our+Survey&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1")
---
Thank you again for all of your support last year!

The 314 Action Team

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4304/4bd7760e/467f4b2a/77acde69/3883552645/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NjdmNGIyYSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MzA0In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/467f4b2a/29bb4304?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4304/4bd7760e/467f4b2a/77acde68/3883552645/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200102_1_1")** to make a donation.

| Hey there, I just wanted to reach back out and make sure you saw this message. **It 's not too late to represent Cory on the floor of the Democratic National Convention this summer.** **Interested in joining us at the convention as a delegate for Cory?[Fill out this form and a member of our team will be in touch soon.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20200102_BHQ_20200102-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We're excited to make some history in Milwaukee this year. All the best,
Tamia Tamia Booker
National Political Director
Cory 2020 _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Hey there, My name is Tamia, I'm the national political director for Cory 2020! As the leader of the political team, one of my responsibilities is to oversee the delegate selection process on behalf of the campaign. **I 'm reaching out today to see if you'd be interested in representing Cory Booker at the Democratic National Convention in Milwaukee next year.** Delegates play a very important role in our primary process. These are the people who cast their votes on the convention floor and decide the Democratic nominee. **[Fill out this form and let us know if you'd be interested in running as a delegate in Pennsylvania.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20200102_BHQ_20200102-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** After completing the form, a member of our team will be in touch. We'll provide all the guidance you need on how to successfully run as an official DNC delegate for Cory Booker. We're looking for delegates all across the country, including Pennsylvania, who share Cory's vision for repairing the damage Trump has done and making justice and opportunity real for every American. **[Let us know if you'd like to represent Pennsylvania and join Cory at the Democratic National Convention in July 2020.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20200102_BHQ_20200102-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we're in Milwaukee next summer, we'd love to have you there with us! Thanks,
Tamia Tamia Booker
National Political Director

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy.

I'm not raising money for this campaign by hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. And I'm not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

You'll always know that I'm fighting for you -- not for any powerful special interest group with deep pockets.

Our first big test of 2020 is soon: The Iowa Caucuses. In the 32 days ahead, we have a plan to build our momentum, grow our moment, and win -- but it's going to take real resources, and grassroots donors make it all possible.

**[So I'm asking: Will you pitch in $2 or whatever you can right now to grow our organizing strength and power this movement towards the first primaries?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b8cf/45c30650/1eb9d8cdf/66fdc1fe/63904267/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJNRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAyMDAxMDJfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2MF_EOQ_BIO_E_20200102_V1S2_P")**

>
When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn.

But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own.

I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $2 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country.

**[That comes down to having a strong fundraising performance in January. If you can, please make a contribution today -- I'll be deeply grateful.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b8cf/45c30650/1eb9d8cdf/66fdc1fe/63904267/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJNRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAyMDAxMDJfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2MF_EOQ_BIO_E_20200102_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

I was just endorsed by the Susan B. Anthony List, one of the country’s largest pro-life organizations. Will you help me keep up the momentum? [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=2b2948430bc142f492d72a6a3fb964dd&_e=Be-rJsMeR7meWkVa1Lg9Gfn89CEOteVfCPfqWcTk_6le7se70t2w7QJGEk7Ym3J54VhAQ4xRcBJXwSuaCmo5XK1Hmm0gtJVDttRmYSHcP36wt1At-6m5Qi8ruijEh1W_cZYPSfoQBJT_z39WyX62HcMMXcVnScOdcL5CnKiYBiqGKH6hFOQj9DGqY6OCF8ckQ0I9freYz4Q6Q-tjlMij3YXr-3xN33BPEfKoEj-98NhWd3v93UMLlmCbVe-24tpPOWg9JRiFVOXqXZjqq_UksKkPmYnG8G1d7z6qEzvmR4n2pj-NdJ7CXhG0nBfYz-2wOLC5RvtBslg8sGzVoUly7JpzAD1DFaXRNQwnpmCmGO4HC1r_6HmttH97HMSdmJcZ6UGBgtb4P9TsBWjUDZmW9cx7UjB1HF-GaRCGSHuq9bsVgQ39_KrK4ufD1Ik1kGTe) | |

Peter,

As a single mother, the issue of life is personal to me. That’s why I’m honored to announce that I have been endorsed by of one of the largest pro-life groups in the country, the Susan B. Anthony List!

With over 700,000 members across America, SBA List aims to end abortion by electing national leaders and advocating for laws that save lives, with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

I’m thrilled to have SBA List’s endorsement, but we need to keep up the momentum after this announcement. **Help me continue my fight for life! Add your name to our pro-life petition.**

Thanks to you, we were able to hit our reelection campaign’s critical end of year fundraising goal for 2019!

Over the last twelve months, Nancy Pelosi and her radical caucus made a complete mockery of our constitutional institutions. In 2020, I fear that it may be more of the same as long as Pelosi controls her grip on the House.

I am running for reelection in a crucially important swing state. In November, it will be up to each of us in Ohio to cast our votes for a representative who will stand against Nancy Pelosi’s radical socialist agenda.

There is too much at stake to fail in 2020. We must stand and fight against Pelosi for the future of our communities across this country.

In Congress, we should be focusing on bringing new middle class jobs back to our communities not scoring political points against the President. Ohio can’t afford another year of obstruction and impeachment from Nancy Pelosi’s Congress.

I am asking for your support to help me continue fighting for the people of this district. We can’t allow Washington lobbyists like my opponent to buy this district with special interest dollars coming in from New York, San Francisco, and Detroit.

I won’t stop fighting for our communities!

Thank you,

Mike Turner

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, I hope you are having a great start to the New Year. I wanted to drop you a note today to say _thank you._ Moments ago, my team let me know that we reached our $500,000 FEC goal and had one of our strongest fundraising months so far. That is incredible. I am humbled and so grateful for your investment in our campaign. **Because of you, we 're in a strong position to grow this into a winning movement that will flip Colorado's Senate seat blue and get Washington working for us.** As a businessman, I approach things a little differently. I truly believe we can come together and get things done to make people's lives better. I believe it because we did it here in Colorado time and time again. With climate change threatening our future, with health care and prescription drug costs crushing families, and with workers needing more opportunities for training and success, now is not the time for political games. Now is the time to work together to find common ground and deliver results. Our momentum is -- and always will be -- fueled by grassroots donors pitching in whatever they can afford to make a meaningful difference in a movement we all believe in. I'm refusing to accept a single penny from corporate PACs because I want to run a campaign we all can be proud of. While our opponent relies on Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their rolodex of shady donors to bankroll his campaign, **we rely on people like you.** And that's the way I like it. Now that 2020 is in full swing, we're expecting Republicans to ramp up their attacks against Democrats nationwide -- especially here in Colorado. But as long as I've got your support, I'm confident we can take 'em on. We have a big and important year ahead. I hope you will stay committed, stay focused, and keep making your voice heard. We have a lot to look forward to. Thanks again and Happy New Year! -- John | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200102-ty?refcode=em-200102-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
P.S. I stopped in Edwards a few days ago with my team and we took a few minutes from campaigning to visit a friend's ranch. Colorado's beauty and magnificence never ceases to amaze me. We are so lucky to live here, and I'm more excited than ever to spend the next year campaigning across our state. See you soon!
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200102-ty?refcode=em-200102-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Now that 2020 is in full swing, we're expecting Republicans to ramp up their attacks against Democrats nationwide -- especially here in Colorado. But as long as I've got your support, I'm confident we can take 'em on. We have a big and important year ahead. I hope you will stay committed, stay focused, and keep making your voice heard. We have a lot to look forward to. Thanks again and Happy New Year! -- John | "=" P.S. I stopped in Edwards a few days ago with my team and we took a few minutes from campaigning to visit a friend's ranch. Colorado's beauty and magnificence never ceases to amaze me. We are so lucky to live here, and I'm more excited than ever to spend the next year campaigning across our state. See you soon! "=" Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 ""

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I hope the transition into the next decade was spent in good cheer amongst family and friends. My team spent a good share of New Year's Eve working to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal.
|
---
| |
---

| | Happy New Year, friends.

I hope the transition into the next decade was spent in good cheer amongst family and friends. My team spent a good share of New Year's Eve working to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal.

And because of the support from folks like you, we did it.

Your dedication to electing responsible leadership for Iowa is synonymous with a mariner's wish for "fair winds and following seas." I thank you for your trust in me.

I'm looking forward to seeing everyone out and about in this fabulous state of Iowa.

Best wishes and Happy New Year,

Michael Franken, VADM USN (ret.)
